---
package: "openpipeline"
version: "v4.2.0"
title: "prot_singlesample"
namespace: "Workflows/prot"
description: "Processing unimodal single-sample CITE-seq data."
type: "workflow"
toc: false
latest: "true"
subtitle: "openpipeline v4.2.0"
---

::: {.column-margin}

### Info

ID: `prot_singlesample`  
Namespace: `workflows/prot`

### Links

[{{< fa brands github >}} View source code](https://github.com/openpipelines-bio/openpipeline/tree/v4.2.0/src/workflows/prot/prot_singlesample)

[![](/images/viash-hub-logo.svg){.vh-icon} Browse all versions](https://www.viash-hub.com/packages/openpipeline)

[![](/images/viash-hub-logo.svg){.vh-icon} Get run instructions](https://www.viash-hub.com/packages/openpipeline/v4.2.0/components/workflows/prot/prot_singlesample)

:::



## Visualisation

```{mermaid}
flowchart TB
    c_filter_do_filter["do_filter"]
    c_filter_filter_with_counts["filter_with_counts"]
    c_filter_filter_with_counts --> c_filter_do_filter
    style c_filter_do_filter fill:#e2f4e7,stroke:#2b8f52,color:#13201a
    style c_filter_filter_with_counts fill:#e2f4e7,stroke:#2b8f52,color:#13201a
```



## Argument groups

### Input

|Name      |Description                                             |Attributes                                  |
|:----------|:--------------------------------------------------|:--------------------|
|`--id`    |ID of the sample.                                       |`string`, required, example: `"foo"`        |
|`--input` |Path to the sample.                                     |`file`, required, example: `"dataset.h5mu"` |
|`--layer` |Input layer to start from. By default, .X will be used. |`string`                                    |


### Output

|Name       |Description                     |Attributes                                 |
|:----------|:--------------------------------------------------|:--------------------|
|`--output` |Destination path to the output. |`file`, required, example: `"output.h5mu"` |


### Filtering options

|Name                      |Description                                 |Attributes                    |
|:----------|:--------------------------------------------------|:--------------------|
|`--min_counts`            |Minimum number of counts captured per cell. |`integer`, example: `200`     |
|`--max_counts`            |Maximum number of counts captured per cell. |`integer`, example: `5000000` |
|`--min_proteins_per_cell` |Minimum of non-zero values per cell.        |`integer`, example: `200`     |
|`--max_proteins_per_cell` |Maximum of non-zero values per cell.        |`integer`, example: `1500000` |
|`--min_cells_per_protein` |Minimum of non-zero values per gene.        |`integer`, example: `3`       |

## Authors


  * Dries De Maeyer [{{< fa brands github >}}](https://github.com/ddemaeyer) [{{< fa brands linkedin >}}](https://linkedin.com/in/dries-de-maeyer-b46a814) (author)

  * Robrecht Cannoodt [{{< fa brands github >}}](https://github.com/rcannood) [{{< fa brands orcid >}}](https://orcid.org/0000-0003-3641-729X) [{{< fa brands linkedin >}}](https://linkedin.com/in/robrechtcannoodt) (author, maintainer)

  * Dries Schaumont [{{< fa brands github >}}](https://github.com/DriesSchaumont) [{{< fa brands orcid >}}](https://orcid.org/0000-0002-4389-0440) [{{< fa brands linkedin >}}](https://linkedin.com/in/dries-schaumont) (author)

## Example commands

You can run the pipeline using `nextflow run`.

### View help

You can use `--help` as a parameter to get an overview of the possible parameters.

```bash
nextflow run openpipelines-bio/openpipeline \
  -r v4.2.0 -latest \
  -main-script target/nextflow/workflows/prot/prot_singlesample/main.nf \
  --help
```

### Run command

<details>
<summary>Example of `params.yaml`</summary>

Generate a `params.yaml` for this component on [Viash Hub](https://www.viash-hub.com/packages/openpipeline/v4.2.0/components/workflows/prot/prot_singlesample).

</details>

Run locally with:

```bash
nextflow run openpipelines-bio/openpipeline \
  -r v4.2.0 -latest \
  -profile docker \
  -main-script target/nextflow/workflows/prot/prot_singlesample/main.nf \
  -params-file params.yaml
```

:::{.callout-note}
Replace `-profile docker` with `-profile podman` or `-profile singularity` depending on the desired backend.
:::

Running on Seqera or through Viash Hub is explained in the [guides](/guides/index.qmd).
